nodes.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
nodes.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联61种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、黑脸琵鹭、Malayan crested fireback等61种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 地中海隼
nodes.summary: 地中海隼（Lanner falcon，学名 Falco biarmicus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于昆拉德·雅各布·特明克、赫爾曼·施萊格爾，常见栖息地包括稀树草原，主要威胁包括农药污染。

nodes.name: 赫爾曼·施萊格爾
nodes.summary: 赫爾曼·施萊格爾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括黑脸琵鹭、普通夜鹰、暗绿背鸬鹚等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

links.key: bird-地中海隼-3d3ed924__distributed_in__loc-昆拉德-雅各布-特明克-10490da9
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lanner falcon (Falco biarmicus) is a medium-sized bird of prey that breeds in Africa, southeast Europe and just into Asia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lanner falcon (Falco biarmicus) is a medium-sized bird of prey that breeds in Africa, southeast Europe and just into Asia

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: However, they are most commonly found in open savannah and sour grasslands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: As chicks can barely fly when leaving the nest they are vulnerable and easy to catch, they are threatened by being captured for falconries and through being caught and killed by angry farmers as a result of these birds sometimes preying on domestic chickens. Indirect anthropogenic threats include loss of suitable habitats as a result of human expansion and the intensive use of pesticides for agriculture
